data.name: Horny: Zero Moan 🔞🦕
data.detailed_description:
Horny: Zero Moan 🔞🦕 — an Adult Visual Novel set in a wild Jungle Fantasy world where survival is everything.

In a savage jungle where strength rules and the weak get forgotten… one outcast is ready to flip the game.



You were never like the others. While they relied on brute force, you chose brains, curiosity… and dangerous questions.
Now the day of initiation has come — and it’s your one shot to prove you’re more than just a misfit.



Or die trying.

🔥 Follow a brutal journey
Face the tribe’s harsh traditions, outsmart your rivals, and push forward through a story driven by survival, ambition, and raw instinct.

🌿 Explore a wild, living world
Hunt, craft, solve ancient puzzles, and uncover secrets hidden deep within ruins and dense jungles. Survival here isn’t just about strength — it’s about strategy.

⚔️ Take what’s yours
Rise against the chief, earn the favor of powerful Priestesses, and fight for your place at the top… or burn everything down.

💔 Dangerous relationships
You’ll meet bold, unpredictable women — allies, enemies, and something in between. Navigate tension, power dynamics, and shifting loyalties.



🌕 Features:
🎭 Story-driven narrative experience
🏹 Mini-games: hunting, puzzles, exploration
🌿 Unique primal fantasy setting
⚔️ Intense atmosphere of survival & power struggle
🔞 Adult content (18+)
👑 Will you rise to the top… or be forgotten?

data.short_description: Outcast. Thinker. Challenger. In a savage jungle tribe, you’ll outsmart rivals, earn the favor of powerful priestesses, and fight for your place at the top. Hunt, explore, and make choices that shape your destiny in this bold adult visual novel. 🔞
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
